code_patches.description: Add NULL check for rrcSetupComplete pointer before dereferencing and check message allocation before use. Fix order of req initialization to after message allocation.
Move req initialization to after message allocation and before usage. Remove usage of req before initialization.
Remove invalid assignment of rrcSetupComplete=NULL before use and remove calls with NULL parameter to prevent crash. Add NULL check before calling crash function.
Add NULL check for msg->rrc_container before decoding to prevent passing NULL pointer downstream.
